name: ai:review-passed
description: AI reviewer verdict: APPROVED (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: ai:review-changes
description: AI reviewer verdict: CHANGES_REQUESTED (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: ai:review-infra-error
description: Reviewer infrastructure failure — no verdict produced (not a code finding; re-run). PLAN-011 F4

name: ai:human-review-required
description: Fork PR or non-allowlisted author (canon §5.1 required state label)

name: skip-ai-review
description: Operator override: suppress re-review and carry forward a valid prior approval

name: ai:autofix-applied
description: AI autofix applied a fix commit; optional for repos that enable ai-review autofix (PLAN-012)

name: ai:autofix-escalated
description: Autofix stopped and handed the PR to a human (deny-path / apply fail / round cap). PLAN-012

name: governance
description: PR touches governance docs, agent definitions, skills, or AI-review configuration

name: docs
description: PR touches docs/, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, or ops/HANDOFF.md (canon §5.2 diff-class: docs)

name: agents
description: PR touches agent definitions, skills, or agent workflow files

name: config
description: PR touches dependency, build, package, container, or pre-commit configuration

name: plans
description: PR touches implementation or verified-planning documents

name: security
description: Security-tagged issue or PR (canon §5.3 area label)

name: skip-audit-trail
description: Audit override; requires a matching [skip-audit-trail] commit-body marker
